text:
is a term used by Asuka in Evangelion: 3.0 You Can (Not) Redo, as an explanation of why she and Mari haven't physically aged after Near Third Impact.

Evangelion pilots no longer undergo any physical changes as they age, except for their hair, that continues to grow normally. They no longer need food and can survive on water alone. They seem unable to sleep, even if they try. Still, in Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon A Time, Shinji is still a "Lilim imitation" and cannot survive without eating or drinking.
